name: French Breakfast Buckwheat Crepes

ingredients.item: Two tablespoons of creamy softened butter

method: Add the creamy softened butter into the bowl.
Add in the buckwheat flour, chocolate powder, vanilla extract, and
Add the mixture in small quantities in a pan.
Let the crepes turn golden on both sides.
You can garnish the crepes with any other thing that you prefer.
Your dish is ready to be served.
